options.name: --subscription
options.description: Name or ID of subscriptions allowed. If none are provided, all subscriptions are checked.

options.name: --server-name
options.description: The name of the server to work on. When none are provided, all servers except system ones are worked on.

options.name: --database-name
options.description: The name of the databases to work on. When none are provided, all databases except system ones are worked on.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Allow interactive authentication mode (opens a browser for authentication). [default: False]

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Test the logic without actually running the script. [default: False]
